data.name: Hentai Age Shadow
data.detailed_description:
Enjoy a fun and addictive card-flipping puzzle game where your memory and focus are put to the test. Flip over cards to find matching pairs—when two identical cards are revealed, they automatically disappear from the board.

Clear all the cards to uncover a stunning hidden image of a beautiful, charming girl. Each level brings a new picture to reveal, rewarding your progress and skill.

Features :

Engaging arcade-style tile-matching gameplay

Two game modes: Normal and Hard

Relaxing and soothing background music

No time limit to complete the level

With simple gameplay, smooth animations, and visually appealing rewards, this game offers a relaxing yet engaging experience. Challenge yourself, improve your memory, and unlock every captivating image as you play!

data.short_description: Match card pairs to clear the board and reveal beautiful hidden images. Test your memory, progress through levels, and unlock charming pictures as you play.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 荷蘭文*, 希臘文*, 日文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 土耳其文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
